context.goal: Switch the editor ribbon to the Forms tools so form fields can be inserted.
context.cues: ONLYOFFICE document editor is open on Document2.pdf with the Home ribbon visible and a simple numbered list on the page.

state_anchor.locator: Home tab highlighted on the top ribbon

procedure.expect: Forms tab becomes active and the ribbon changes to form controls such as Text Field, Combo Box, Dropdown, Checkbox, Radio Button, and Image.
